tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsAccountLinksCreate
tools.description: Creates a new account link between a Hotel Center account and a Google Ads account.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsAccountLinksDelete
tools.description: Deletes an account link.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsAccountLinksList
tools.description: Returns the account links for a Hotel Center account.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsBrandsCreate
tools.description: Creates a new brand. Because Google detects brands from your existing properties, you only need this operation when you want to configure a brand before you send its properties to Google. Note that it might take a couple of days after your listing feed first provides a brand for the brand to appear.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsBrandsList
tools.description: Returns the brands for a partner account.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsBrandsPatch
tools.description: Updates a brand.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsFreeBookingLinksReportViewsQuery
tools.description: **DEPRECATED:** Use PropertyPerformanceReportService.QueryPropertyPerformanceReport, which also has impression reporting, instead. Provides the ability to query (get, filter, and segment) a free booking links report for a specific account.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsHotelsSetLiveOnGoogle
tools.description: Collection-level custom method to update the Live on Google status for multiple properties. Each call can turn on or off multiple hotels. To turn some hotels on and turn some hotels off, you will have to make multiple calls.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsHotelViewsList
tools.description: Returns the list of hotel views.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsHotelViewsSummarize
tools.description: Returns summarized information about hotels.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsIconsCreate
tools.description: Uploads a new icon and starts its review process. Generates an `icon_id` and includes it in the icon's resource name, which is the format `accounts/{account_id}/icons/{icon_id}` Returns HTTP status 400 and doesn't trigger the review process if the icon has any of these conditions: * Image is not in PNG format, or not convertible to PNG format. * Size less than 72 pixels * Size greater than 1200 pixels * Aspect ratio other than 1:1

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsIconsList
tools.description: Returns the `Icon`s for a partner account.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsListingsVerify
tools.description: returns verified listings with data issues and serving eligibilities

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsParticipationReportViewsQuery
tools.description: Provides the ability to query (get, filter, and segment) a participation report for a particular account.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsPriceAccuracyViewsList
tools.description: Lists the available price accuracy views.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsPriceAccuracyViewsSummarize
tools.description: Returns the price accuracy summary.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsPriceCoverageViewsGetLatest
tools.description: Returns the latest price coverage view in full detail.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsPriceCoverageViewsList
tools.description: Returns the entire price coverage history.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsPropertyPerformanceReportViewsQuery
tools.description: Provides the ability to query (get, filter, and segment) a property performance links report for a specific account.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsReconciliationReportsCreate
tools.description: Creates a reconciliation report and uploads it to Google.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsReconciliationReportsGet
tools.description: Returns a reconciliation report.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsReconciliationReportsList
tools.description: Returns a list of the names of created reconciliation reports.

tools.name: accounts.travelpartnerAccountsReconciliationReportsValidate
tools.description: Validates a reconciliation report.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
